_meta.author: Peter Higgins
_meta.purpose: Single source of truth for all HUF project identity, contact information, websites, canonical names, terms, standards, and administrative references. Extends RWA-001. If any AI or document uses a different name, URL, or term — this file wins.

principal.name: Peter Higgins
principal.role: Independent Researcher, Framework Author, Sole Operator

corporate.standard_description: Rogue Wave Audio Corporate Reference Standard — governs all HUF operational procedures
corporate.note: Rogue Wave Audio is Peter's corporate identity. RWA-001 is the governance standard under which HUF operates.

project.tagline: Compositional structure as an open-loop monitoring signal.
project.status: EXPERIMENT LADDER CLOSED — 21 experiments complete, Information Mechanics framework established. Refresh chain v5.0. Four physical domains (Energy, Matter, Force, Gravity) form K₄ complete graph with all 6 bridges validated. Compositional Uncertainty Principle: floor = 6.37×N^0.18 (topological invariant). Force-matter asymmetry: 8:1 (steel), 296:0 (EM). 12-step Higgins Decomposition pipeline finalized. Three noise floors triad: quantum, thermodynamic, compositional. Closing documents produced: Experiment Journal, Complete Summary, Information Mechanics Declaration.
project.domain: Compositional data analysis (CoDa), Aitchison geometry, monitoring systems

milestones.2026-02: Ratio State Monitoring name locked for literature submission
milestones.2026-03: GitHub repo launched, multi-AI collaboration established
milestones.2026-04-13: Full repo restructure. AI refresh layer validated across 5 AI systems. 286 files. System declared STABLE.
milestones.2026-04-17: codawork2026/ consolidated. Geochemistry extension (40,666 rocks). Gold Standard Working Example. Refresh chain v3.0.
milestones.2026-04-18: HIVIP methodology established. Nuclear staircase programme. Refresh chain v3.1.
milestones.2026-04-19: Programme complete: 75 systems, 12 experiments. F17 full chain (44 domains). Nature's Confirmation Series (23 systems, 96%). CIP terminology sweep. Refresh chain v3.3–v3.8.
milestones.2026-04-20: EXP-13 Calibration Proof (7 theorems, 10⁻¹⁵ precision). HDCP (5 theorems). HFPA hierarchy locked. Higgins Tagging Convention. EXP-14 HFSP on AME2020 (Ne-20 discovery). Refresh chain v4.0–v4.3.
milestones.2026-04-21: EXP-14 addendum: intermediate rocks decoded via pairwise CoDa balance (Peter Higgins insight). Super squeeze: 1/π→φ² at δ=0.00003 (tightest in programme). EXP-15 X-ray crystallography: first ENERGY-domain confirmation, dual-anchor validated. Refresh chain v4.4.
milestones.2026-04-22: Refresh chain audit and update to v4.5. Naming drift corrected ('Unified'→'Unity'). Definitive Higgins Decomposition Reference v1.0 (19pp). All 4 new methods (super squeeze, pairwise balance, dual-anchor, anti-lock) documented in refresh chain. Experiment registry extended to EXP-15 (81 systems).
milestones.2026-04-22_v5: EXP-16 spring-mass force composition (21 diagrams, interactive simulator). EXP-17 Compositional Uncertainty Principle (α=+0.18, artifact-free). EXP-18 force-matter bridge (8:1 asymmetry in mild steel). EXP-18b K₄ complete graph (6/6 bridges). Information Mechanics Declaration. Experiment ladder CLOSED. Refresh chain v5.0.
milestones.2026-04-22_simplex_scope: Higgins Simplex Scope named as CoDaWork 2026 centerpiece. Full programme review and reflection. 37 claims classified. Mathematical addendum updated with Compositional Uncertainty Principle theorem. All tracking files refreshed to current state.
milestones.2026-04-22_canonical_validation: Canonical Validation Run: all 19 experiments (EXP-01 through EXP-18b) re-run through 12-step Higgins Decomposition pipeline v1.0. All 19 complete. Gauge R&R: 4/4 DETERMINISTIC (bit-identical outputs on identical data). Deliverables: 19 JSON results, 19 PNG diagnostic plots, combined results JSON, gauge R&R report, Canonical_Validation_Report.docx. Pipeline scripts (higgins_decomposition_12step.py, run_full_experiment_chain.py, gauge_rr_full.py) distributed to all experiment folders. Refresh chain v5.1.
milestones.2026-04-22_exp19b_euler_family: POINT OF INTEREST — EULER-FAMILY DISCOVERY. EXP-19b Fourier conjugate pair oracle validates 6 pipeline optimizations (O(N²)→O(N), 7.8× speedup). Peter Higgins directive 'I do not trust loss of test and data' retained all 28 constants. Hunt through real-world data revealed: EXP-01 Gold/Silver σ²_A≈1/(2π) δ=0.020%, EXP-03 SEMF σ²_A≈1/(π^e) δ=0.013%, EXP-14 AME2020 σ²_A≈2π δ=0.029%. All three below p<0.05 under uniform null. Trajectory crossings in EXP-07, EXP-11, EXP-12, EXP-14, EXP-16. Pipeline's log→complex→polar structure maps exactly to Euler identity e^(iπ)=-1. Cross-domain confirmation across commodities, nuclear physics, QCD, gravity — 44 orders of magnitude. Refresh chain v5.3.
milestones.2026-04-23_naturalness: TRANSCENDENTAL NATURALNESS HYPOTHESIS (Peter Higgins). Character Analysis of Higgins Decomposition: 19-page DUT exploded diagnostic, 63 atomic operations, full state machine, variable registry. Constant library expanded 29→35 (Euler reciprocals + Lambert W + Dottie + Glaisher-Kinkelin). Conjugate pair catalog expanded 12→13 (P13 Airy ↔ cubic phase). Hypothesis: absence of transcendental proximity in decomposed system is diagnostic — either non-natural or improperly decomposed. No prior art (Gemini confirmed). HTP rapid pretest tool built. Full sweep: 17/18 real-world = NATURAL, 2 INVESTIGATE, 0 FLAG. Important finding: uniform random passes (necessary not sufficient). Refresh chain v5.4.
milestones.2026-04-23_adversarial: ADVERSARIAL ROBUSTNESS ANALYSIS. 21 attack vectors, 14 survived, 6 broken (input validation), 1 crash (D=1). Fail-safe property confirmed: no plausible-but-wrong output possible. 4 input guards specified. Character Analysis now 28 pages (Sections 1-16). Hˢ symbol adopted. PLL fully retired → HVLD. Document positioned as standalone Hˢ tool spec. Three interactive tools updated (Spectrum Analyzer, EXP-16, EXP-19). Refresh chain v5.5.
milestones.2026-04-23_release: Hˢ RELEASE VALIDATION. 15/15 NATURAL across 12 domains. Pipeline v1.0 with 4 guards, 35 constants, HVLD, match density, PID, transfer entropy. All extensions built and tested. Input guards operational (D≥2, N≥5, NaN/Inf, scale). Match density discriminator resolves IVT false positive (39× gap). Character Analysis 30+ pages. Legacy tools archived. Refresh chain v5.7. RELEASE STATE for CoDaWork 2026.

web_presence.note: GitHub Pages is live and serves the README as a public site. This is the primary web-indexable URL.

governance.doctrine: Instrument reads, never actuates. Human decides, loop stays open.

cip.description: 6 rules that cannot be changed without operator (Peter) approval. Formerly called 'Pipeline Lock List' (retired 2026-04-19).

pll.full: RETIRED — replaced by HVLD (Higgins Vertex Lock Diagnostic) on 2026-04-23
pll.reason: Engineering analogy too thin — only 'lock point' concept survived; no phase detector, loop filter, VCO, or feedback loop in the pipeline. Risk of confusion with actual PLL circuits.
NOT: Do not use PLL in any new HUF documentation

keff.description: RMS aggregator of 4 polarity-aligned roots (a0-a3), locked at p=2

hivp.description: Regression-chain rule for advancing the method without breaking prior DUTs

hivip.full: Higgins Iterative Validation and Integrity Protocol
hivip.description: Umbrella methodology: theory + instrument development + contamination control + regression discipline
hivip.one_line: EITT is the science. The Higgins Decomposition is the engine. HIVP is the chain. HIVIP is the full methodology.

higgins_decomposition.description: Operational 12-step state-machine / process-line implementation of CoDa + EITT

bell_test.normalization_note: 10.09% = (2.2018-2.0)/2.0 is the violation magnitude. 12.31% = fraction of 18,360 configurations exceeding S=2. Previously conflated.
bell_test.description: Gas carrier acts as entangling gate. 9 structural isomorphisms between QIT and CoDa.

hvld.description: Quadratic parabola fit to the σ²_A variance trajectory. The vertex is the diagnostic lock point — where compositional variance changes character (accelerating ↔ decelerating). Replaces PLL (Phase-Locked Loop) as of 2026-04-23.

hs_symbol.full: Hˢ — Higgins Decomposition on the Simplex
hs_symbol.description: Shorthand symbol indicating a Higgins Decomposition is being applied. The superscript S stands for simplex — the geometric space where all compositions live. Used in tool interfaces, diagrams, and inline references as a compact operator notation.
NOT: HD (ambiguous — could mean 'hard drive', 'high definition', etc.)

codawork_2026.full_name: 11th International Workshop on Compositional Data Analysis
codawork_2026.presentation_strategy: Stanley Steamer — their tools, their geometry, your application. Gas turbine stays in the garage.

ember.usage: Primary energy composition data — 6 countries, 8 carriers, 24 years

ngfs.full: Network for Greening the Financial System Phase 4

gemini.note: Best instruction-following, inferred structure from manifest paths

cold_start_validation.conclusion: All 5 platforms achieved 100% question accuracy from FAST_REFRESH. System validated for cross-AI cold-start onboarding.

mathematical_foundations.note: HUF does not claim new mathematics. These are the foundations it builds on.

aitchison.author: John Aitchison
aitchison.contribution: Compositional data analysis, simplex geometry, log-ratio transforms

claims: Composition can be monitored directly, not only as a statistical correction
In some systems, structural change appears in ratio-state before magnitude-based indicators visibly fail
Shannon entropy is near-invariant under geometric-mean decimation of compositional time series (EITT)
non_claims: Universal validity — cross-domain validity must be earned domain by domain
Every compositional change is harmful, actionable, or predictive
HUF replaces domain expertise, causal explanation, or policy judgment
Autonomous intervention is justified on compositional readings alone
key_claims.falsifiable: No existing monitoring framework performs compositional change detection at the carrier level with formal perturbation-based drift measurement.

file_hierarchy.conflict_resolution: HUF_ADMIN.json wins on identity/contact/naming. FAST_REFRESH wins on numbers/formulas/science. If both address the same field, they must agree — any disagreement is a bug to be reported to Peter.

milestones.2026-04-22_fourier_pair_fix: EXP-04 sinc->Bessel J1 fix. Fourier pair contamination (sinc<->rect) identified and resolved. Miller backward recurrence for J1. Validation report updated with Section 7: Fourier Pair Watchpoint.
milestones.2026-04-22_exp19_fourier_conjugate_pairs: EXP-19: Fourier Conjugate Pair Study. 12 pairs, all 24 functions through 12-step pipeline. Self-conjugates perfectly preserved. Information recovery via simplex confirmed.
milestones.2026-04-22_exp19b_pipeline_optimization: EXP-19b: Pipeline Optimization via Conjugate Pair Validation. 6 optimization variants tested against 12-pair oracle. ALL 6 PASS with zero deviation. Key achievement: O(N²·D) → O(N·D) via Welford incremental variance. 7.8× speedup at N=10000. Ternary+Complex+Helix fused into single pass. All 28 transcendental constants RETAINED in super squeeze (Peter Higgins directive: no test/data loss). Step reordering (entropy first) proven safe. Full streamlined pipeline (OPT-F = Welford + CLR merge + ternary fusion, full squeeze) recommended for production.
